text: A vehicle inspection report is invalid after the end of the 12th month following the month in which the report is issued.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.254 — Validity of Vehicle Inspection Report

A vehicle inspection report is invalid after the end of the 12th month following the month in which the report is issued.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 28, eff. March 1, 2015.*

subsections.text: A vehicle inspection report is invalid after the end of the 12th month following the month in which the report is issued.

history.raw: Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 28, eff. March 1, 2015.
